title: Certificate of Completion Generator
description: An interactive tool to generate and print professional certificates of completion for course graduates with customizable text and border styles.
subject: Mathematics
author: Dan McCreary
learningObjectives: Identify the required fields of a certificate of completion: recipient name, course name, instructor, and completion date
Explain how a live preview re-renders the certificate from the form fields as each keystroke changes the underlying data
Compare the simple, ornate, and modern border styles and select one appropriate to a given audience and occasion
Produce a print-ready certificate in 11 by 8.5 inch landscape at actual size, or export it as a PDF for digital distribution
